case_title: DEPARTMENT OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS VS. ART CONSTRUCTION & ROOFING INC.

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF DEPARTMENT OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS AS TO DEFENDANT ART CONSTRUCTION & ROOFING INC. JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DEPARTMENT OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ART CONSTRUCTION & ROOFING INC. $21,800.00 PRINCIPAL, $2,564.51 INTEREST, $128.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $24,492.51, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
